name: KpiCard
description: Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

api.name: KpiCard
api.description: Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Small caption shown next to the optional icon, above the value (e.g. "Revenue").

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The headline metric, rendered large and bold (e.g. "$12,400"). Pre-formatted by the caller — this component does not format numbers.

parameters.name: Delta
parameters.description: Change amount rendered via Delta (e.g. +12.5). Omitted when null.

parameters.name: DeltaFormat
parameters.description: How Delta is formatted: as a percentage (default) or an absolute number.

parameters.name: DeltaPositive
parameters.description: Whether a positive Delta should be styled as good (default) or bad — e.g. for metrics where a rising value is undesirable (cost, churn).

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Small icon rendered in a muted square badge next to Label.

parameters.name: SparkContent
parameters.description: Sparkline or mini-chart rendered alongside the delta, capped at 140px wide.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <KpiCard Label="Total Revenue" Value="$48,295" />
    <KpiCard Label="Active Users" Value="12,843" />
    <KpiCard Label="Conversion Rate" Value="3.6%" />
</Grid>

examples.title: With Delta
examples.code:
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <KpiCard Label="Monthly Revenue" Value="$18,450" Delta="8.3" />
    <KpiCard Label="Churn Rate" Value="2.1%" Delta="-0.4" DeltaPositive="KpiCard.KpiDeltaDirection.Bad" />
    <KpiCard Label="Support Tickets" Value="247" Delta="-12"
             DeltaFormat="KpiCard.KpiDeltaFormat.Absolute"
             DeltaPositive="KpiCard.KpiDeltaDirection.Bad" />
</Grid>

examples.title: With Icon and Sparkline
examples.code:
<KpiCard Label="Page Views" Value="94,210" Delta="5.7">
    <IconContent>
        <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.TrendingUp)" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </IconContent>
    <SparkContent>
        <Sparkline Data="@_viewData" Class="h-10 w-full" />
    </SparkContent>
</KpiCard>

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Small icon rendered in a muted square badge next to Label.

slots.name: SparkContent
slots.description: Sparkline or mini-chart rendered alongside the delta, capped at 140px wide.

mdSummary:
# KpiCard

Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kpi-card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| KpiCard | Label | `string?` | `` | Small caption shown next to the optional icon, above the value (e.g. "Revenue"). |
| KpiCard | Value | `string?` | `` | The headline metric, rendered large and bold (e.g. "$12,400"). Pre-formatted by the caller — this component does not format numbers. |
| KpiCard | Delta | `double?` | `` | Change amount rendered via Delta (e.g. +12.5). Omitted when null. |
| KpiCard | DeltaFormat | `KpiDeltaFormat` | `KpiDeltaFormat.Percent` | How Delta is formatted: as a percentage (default) or an absolute number. |
| KpiCard | DeltaPositive | `KpiDeltaDirection` | `KpiDeltaDirection.Good` | Whether a positive Delta should be styled as good (default) or bad — e.g. for metrics where a rising value is undesirable (cost, churn). |
| KpiCard | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Small icon rendered in a muted square badge next to Label. |
| KpiCard | SparkContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Sparkline or mini-chart rendered alongside the delta, capped at 140px wide. |
| KpiCard | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| KpiCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (KpiCard) — Small icon rendered in a muted square badge next to Label.
- `SparkContent` (KpiCard) — Sparkline or mini-chart rendered alongside the delta, capped at 140px wide.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<KpiCard />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/KpiCard/KpiCard.razor`
